title: Health Canada Report on Plans and Priorities - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada Report on Plans and Priorities
Reports on Plans and Priorities (Part III ) are individual expenditure plans for each department and agency. They are tabled in Parliament by the President of the Treasury Board on behalf of the ministers responsible.
- 2017 - 18 Departmental Plan: Health Canada
- Supporting Information on Lower-Level Programs 2017-18 Departmental Plan - Health Canada
- Future-Oriented Statement of Operations
- Supplementary Information Tables 2017-18 Departmental Plan: Health Canada
- 2016-2017 Report on Plans and Priorities Future-Oriented Statement of Operations 2016-2017 Supplementary Information Tables Procurement Plan (Assets and Acquired Services) 2016-2017
- Future-Oriented Statement of Operations
- 2016-2017 Supplementary Information Tables
- Procurement Plan (Assets and Acquired Services) 2016-2017
- Report on Plans and Priorities for 2012-2013 Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy
- Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy
- Report on Plans and Priorities for 2011-2012 Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy
- Departmental Sustainable Development Strategy
- Report on Plans and Priorities for 2010-2011
- Report on Plans and Priorities for 2009-2010
- Report on Plans and Priorities for 2008-2009
